headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on DuPont de Nemours, Lowers Price Target to $56
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $60 to $56.
